message:
fix(security): path traversal in export handler and command injection in import

Adds workspace containment validation for JSONLPath in the RPC export
handler, preventing arbitrary file writes via path traversal. Removes
the shell-based runGitCommand function and refactors all callers to
use exec.Command with individual arguments, eliminating command injection
via shell metacharacters in file paths.

Fixes: dolt-test-31d, dolt-test-7fa

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
